metadata.description: ABC 抽象基类: ```python from abc import ABC, abstractmethod # Define an interface contract. class MyInterface(ABC): @abstractmethod def my_method(self): pass # Subclasses must implement the abstract method. class MyClass(MyInterface): def my_method(self): print("Method implemented") # collections.abc includes mixin protocols. from collections.abc import Iterable class MyIterableClass(Iterable): def __iter__(self): yield 1 yield 2 yield 3 ``` Explanation: - `ABC` and `abstractmethod` are used to define an abstract base class with an abstract method, which enforces that any subclass must implement the specified method. - The `collections.abc` module provides a set of mixin protocols (like `Iterable`) that can be used to add specific behaviors to classes without inheriting from them directly.

data_pointers.title: ABC 抽象基类
data_pointers.content_preview: ABC 抽象基类: ```python from abc import ABC, abstractmethod # Define an interface contract. class MyInterface(ABC): @abstractmethod def my_method(self): pass # Subclasses must implement the abstract method. class MyClass(MyInterface): def my_method(self): print("Method implemented") # collections.abc includes mixin protocols. from collections.abc import Iterable class MyIterableClass(Iterable): def __iter__(self): yield 1 yield 2 yield 3 ``` Explanation: - `ABC` and `abstractmethod` are used to define an abstract base class with an abstract method, which enforces that any subclass must implement the specified method. - The `collections.abc` module provides a set of mixin protocols (like `Iterable`) that can be used to add specific behaviors to classes without inheriting from them directly.

common_pitfalls: 忘记在子类中实现所有抽象方法就尝试实例化，导致 TypeError。
在抽象方法中使用了 `pass` 但未提供任何实现，误以为子类可以自动继承，实际上子类必须显式覆盖。
将 `@abstractmethod` 放在 `@staticmethod` 或 `@property` 等装饰器之后，导致抽象方法无法正确注册，应确保 `@abstractmethod` 在最内层。
